title: New features Announcements
excerpt:
Hi @monday team. I was wondering, there is something going on with this? 
there is no new features announcements via community, 
there is no new features announcements via monday platform. 
there is no new features annou…

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @monday team. I was wondering, there is something going on with this?

there is no new features announcements via community,
there is no new features announcements via monday platform.
there is no new features announcements via blog.
there is no roadmap.

Something big is coming???

posts.author: LaurentConroux (Laurent Conroux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hlopezvc,

There was an announcement last Friday (04/28) here:

monday.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

I agree a roadmap page would be nice, even a very tentative or short-ranged one.

Have a nice day,
Laurent

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @LaurentConroux i dont know where this link leads to,

posts.author: LaurentConroux (Laurent Conroux)
posts.cookedHtml: @hlopezvc This is the Partner Community board, probably only available for partners on invite only.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
hlopezvc:

Hi @monday team. I was wondering, there is something going on with this?

there is no new features announcements via community,

there is no new features announcements via blog.

Something big is coming???

Well @LaurentConroux im not a partner, the reason of this post is to know whats happening.
